scenarios.description: load() returns Dotenv with only system and file vars when systemProperties=false and .env empty (branch-false, loop-0)
scenarios.precondition: create temporary directory with an empty .env file; builder = DotenvBuilder.directory(tempDir); ensure no pre-existing environment variables named in file
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv instance whose entries() contains exactly System.getenv() entries and entries(tempFilter) returns empty set for file entries
pseudocode: TEST TC01 load with empty file and default systemProperties

scenarios.description: load() sets one system property when systemProperties=true and one entry in .env (branch-true, loop-1)
scenarios.precondition: create temp dir with .env containing "KEY=VALUE"; builder = DotenvBuilder.directory(tempDir).systemProperties()
pseudocode: TEST TC02 load with one entry and systemProperties enabled

scenarios.description: load() sets multiple system properties when systemProperties=true and multiple entries in .env (branch-true, loop-N)
scenarios.precondition: create temp dir with .env containing "A=1\nB=2\nC=3"; builder = DotenvBuilder.directory(tempDir).systemProperties()
pseudocode: TEST TC03 load with multiple entries and systemProperties enabled

scenarios.description: load() throws DotenvException when .env malformed and default throwIfMalformed=true (exception)
scenarios.precondition: create temp dir with .env containing malformed line "BADLINE" (no '='); builder = DotenvBuilder.directory(tempDir)
scenarios.expectedResult: throws DotenvException; no system property set for key "BADLINE"
pseudocode: TEST TC04 load throws on malformed file
